Meet Howlie

Hey! I'm Howlie. I'm your guide through the Haunted Library. Pick a book, grab a coloring page, or sneak into Free Haunts. Just don't wake up the books...

Howlie is the face of Haunted Library — the fun, spooky guide who helps readers find their next adventure.
